prompt:
SUBJECTS
A single 800V prismatic battery cell @Image1 in thermal runaway; its casing ruptures on the side exposing the glowing wound jelly-roll electrodes, and a violent jet of sparks and hot grey-white gas blasts sideways. Style/lighting reference @Image2.

ENVIRONMENT
Dark forensic studio, the cell isolated on a matte stage among a few neighbors, deep black background, side-lit volumetric haze.

STYLE
Forensic engineering-documentary cinematography. Deep carbon-black (#0C0F14) environment, low-key dramatic raking light. Heat reads as ONE color ramp only - amber #FFB02E to orange #FF5A1F to white-hot #FFF3E0; cool coolant-blue #3D9DF6 only on still-normal parts. Bone-white crisp edge highlights. Physically real brushed-metal and matte materials, shallow depth of field, subtle volumetric haze. NO text, NO logos, NO on-screen labels, NO rainbow colors, NO sci-fi HUD, NO blue particle FX, NO cartoon look.

CONTINUITY
Keep @Image1 cell design exact. Body glows orange to white-hot; the rupture exposes internal layers; pressurized directional jet, hot gas and sparks only, no open flame.

AUDIO RULE
No BGM, no music, no score. Diegetic ambience and synchronized physical SFX only. No dialogue or narration.

TIMELINE
0:00-0:02 Medium side view, locked; the cell body reddens, casing seam bulging under pressure. SFX: rising metallic groan, pressure hiss.
0:02-0:055 Slow-motion side tracking; the side casing ruptures, exposed jelly-roll layers glow white-hot, a violent spark-and-gas jet blasts sideways. SFX: explosive rupture, spark spatter.
0:055-0:08 HARD-CUT END FRAME: locked medium-close, camera settled, sideways jet sustained and readable, exposed white-hot electrode layers centered, glowing body. Hold 0.5s. No fade, dissolve, morph, or camera drift. SFX: roaring jet into steady hiss.
